descriptions: Summon an Abomination to fight on your side.
Explosion area of effect increased by 20%
Explosion area of effect increased by 40%
Grenade now explodes instantly instead of after a delay.
Summon a totem that rapidly shoots chaos bolts dealing arcane damage.
Summon a fractal Viking, Pyromancer and Marksman to fight on your side.
+75% of Damage Returned to the Attacker
Summon a tornado traveling towards target direction dealing arcane damage to monsters on its path.
Explosion area of effect increased by 75%
Unleash a massive anchor swinging around you dealing cold damage.
Cast a frozen orb traveling in target direction releasing icicles, freezing and dealing cold damage to monsters on its path.
Strike monsters with increased attack damage causing lightning to chain between them dealing lightning damage.
Increases your and party members lightning skill damage.
Throw a huge piercing scimitar dealing increased damage to monsters in its path which returns back to you after a short delay.
+100% of Damage Returned to the Attacker
Fire a colossal arrow exploding on hit dealing area of effect damage.
Summon a holy hammer that spirals outwards dealing arcane damage on hit.
Throw a truck tire that deals fire damage on hit.
Chance when striking to unleash piercing bone spikes in an arc dealing physical damage.
